name: 13q33_34_telomeric_SD
description: Distal 13q33.3-q34 subtelomeric segmental-duplication cluster covering the last ~3 Mb of 13q including F7/F10 coagulation cluster, IRS2, and the telomere-adjacent shore. Carries SDs shared with other subtelomeres (2q, 4q, 10q) and mediates rare 13q-subtelomeric deletions.

architecture.internal_structure: Telomere-proximal SD modules of 5-50 kb at 92-98% identity shared with chr2q, chr4q, chr10q subtelomeres; interspersed with the F7/F10 coagulation cluster (proximal flank) and IRS2 (distal flank).
